content.stem: All cats have whiskers. Fluffy is a cat. What can we conclude?

options.text: Cats are the only animals with whiskers

content.explanation: Since all cats have whiskers and Fluffy is a cat, we can logically conclude that Fluffy must have whiskers.

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Student adds information not given in the premises
Student incorrectly extends the rule to all animals
Student assumes cats are the only animals with this trait
